$comment: Project-shared Claude Code settings. Personal/per-machine permissions go in settings.local.json (gitignored).

hooks.command: input=$(cat); path=$(echo "$input" | grep -o '"file_path":[[:space:]]*"[^"]*"' | head -1); case "$path" in *SnippetLauncher.Core*.cs*|*SnippetLauncher.Core.Tests*.cs*) echo '[hook] Core file changed — running Core tests'; dotnet test tests/SnippetLauncher.Core.Tests/SnippetLauncher.Core.Tests.csproj --nologo -v quiet 2>&1 | tail -20 ;; esac; exit 0
